prestazioni: LS7 (7.0L GM small-block V8, engine code LS7) forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport 2618 alloy pistons (12.5:1 compression), Callies Compstar 4340 forged crankshaft, and Manley Performance titanium intake valves with Inconel exhaust valves for sustained 8,500 RPM operation

Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (82mm inducer, 85mm exducer) with billet compressor wheel, T6 housing, and 1.28 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring Burns Stainless 4-2-1 headers and a dual-mode Akrapović titanium exhaust with electronically actuated bypass valves for track/cruise modes

Motec M150 ECU with custom LS7-specific firmware, integrated with a Pectel SQ6M dash logger, AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors, and a Nitrous Express Gen-X Direct Port nitrous system (150hp shot) with progressive controller for on-demand power addition
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (GTR720-specific, not generic) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, including custom 3D-printed ABS extension flares for aggressive stance
Seibon Carbon GT-spec dry carbon fiber roof panel (weighing 4.2kg) and full carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts for LS7 heat extraction, finished in matte clear coat with exposed weave

OMP Racing carbon fiber bucket seats (Ultima-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, paired with a custom roll cage designed by Safety Devices (UK) featuring 45mm diameter chromoly tubing and integrated fire suppression system ports
